compiled_state.title: Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md with planning.external_dependency_block_enabled and planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds keys
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add two new key entries to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md:
1. planning.external_dependency_block_enabled — boolean feature flag (default false) consumed by brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan, and sprint
2. planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds — integer timeout in seconds (default 30) consumed by sprint's manual-pause handshake verification_command execution

## File
plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

## Insertion context
Insert in the planning.* key group. An existing planning.* group exists (e.g., planning.interactive at line ~851, sprint.max_replan_cycles at line ~1198). Add the two new keys after the existing planning.* entries and before sprint.*. Follow the standard table format used by all other keys:

```
### `planning.external_dependency_block_enabled`

| | |
|---|---|
| **Description** | ... |
| **Accepted values** | `true`, `false` |
| **Default** | `false` |
| **Used by** | ... |
```

## Done Definitions
- When complete, planning.external_dependency_block_enabled key entry exists with standard table format, default false, used by brainstorm/preplanning/implementation-plan/sprint
- When complete, planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds key entry exists with standard table format, default 30 (seconds), used by sprint
- When complete, both entries are grouped with existing planning.* keys
- When complete, check-referential-integrity.sh and check-contract-schemas.sh pass

## Testing
testing_mode: GREEN
Structural boundary test: grep plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md for '### `planning.external_dependency_block_enabled`' and '### `planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds`' — both must be present.

## Considerations
- [Maintainability] Follow existing key entry table format exactly (the shim-exempt comment pattern if referencing internal scripts)
- [Maintainability] Default false for the flag preserves backward compatibility per SC6 of the epic
- [Accuracy] Verify the exact timeout key name against story 9e66-3e5d before committing; planning.verification_command_timeout_seconds is the expected name from the epic description
